items.title: India’s first and oldest gay rights activist is also on the extreme right of RSS
items.dek: Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) is Indian right-wing Hindutva volunteer paramilitary organisation. It is the progenitor and leader of a large body of Hindutva
items.body: Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) is Indian right-wing Hindutva volunteer paramilitary organisation. It is the progenitor and leader of a large body of Hindutva organisations called the Sangh Parivar which has developed a presence in all facets of Indian society and includes the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), the ruling political party under Narendra Modi, the prime minister of India. submitted by /u/Solid-Move-1411 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran activists tell BBC how threat of war intensifies trauma of repression
items.dek: A dissident in Tehran says she feels helpless and under immense psychological pressure.
items.body: A dissident in Tehran says she feels helpless and under immense psychological pressure.
